ideation: This animation sequence depicts a protective, nurturing pose for the family emoji. The adult arm will gently embrace the child, while the child's arm will reach towards the adult. This sequence will use 4 frames to show the transition. Frame 1 begins with the adult's right arm extended downward towards the child, slightly angled inward to convey a protective posture. The child's left arm extends slightly forward, reaching toward the adult. Frame 2 shows the adult's arm moving upwards to embrace the child, while the child's arm continues reaching towards the adult. Frame 3 shows the adult's arm fully embracing the child, and the child's arm making full contact. Frame 4 shows a slight relaxation of the adult's arm to maintain the embrace but avoid stiffness, and the child's arm maintaining the connection.

frames.beat: adult's right arm extends down protectivly
right arm begins to gently embrace the child
adult's arm fully embraces, child reaches back
a gentle, secure hug is held between them
